args.name: concept:sql-query-all
args.wp_rule: Executes a parameterized SQL read operation and returns a fully-materialized array of all matching rows. Sql is the parameterized query string. SqlArgs carries positional or named parameters. SqlRowSet is a fully-materialized, in-memory row set: indexable, length-known, and re-readable. Materializing every matching row in memory is the post-condition of this concept, not a realization loss. Implementation-defined row order in the absence of an ORDER BY clause, transaction isolation, and sync versus async behavior are realization loss dimensions.
